description_long: This is a compact white hatchback car with a modern, aerodynamic design and a five-door configuration, including a rear hatch door. The vehicle features a sloped hood, large windshield, and a panoramic black roof, giving it a sleek urban appearance. The front grille is subtle, with integrated headlights and a small emblem at the center. The side profile reveals flush door handles, body-colored side mirrors, and slightly flared wheel arches. At the rear, the car has distinctive taillights, a rear wiper, and a visible badge, with a single exhaust outlet. The windows are tinted, and the wheels are dark, contrasting with the bright body color.
description: A modern white hatchback car with a panoramic black roof, five doors, and sleek, aerodynamic styling. It features tinted windows, dark wheels, and distinctive front and rear lighting.
description_view_0: Front view showing the sloped hood, integrated headlights, subtle grille, and central emblem.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the five-door layout, flush handles, tinted windows, and panoramic roof.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the rear hatch door, taillights, badge, rear wiper, and single exhaust.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the door configuration, side mirrors, and wheel arches.
